tiers.label: $50M+ revenue — ASIC-verifiable
tiers.rationale: Matches the Corporations Act s45A large proprietary company line (2 of 3: revenue >=$50M, gross assets >=$25M, employees >=100). Large proprietary companies must lodge audited financials with ASIC (Form 388), which appear on the public register. A candidate in this tier that also has a lodged financial report on ASIC's register is high-confidence.

tiers.label: $20M-$50M revenue — estimate only
tiers.rationale: Below the statutory large-proprietary line. No ASIC lodgement obligation exists at this size, so there is no independent public filing to corroborate revenue. Confidence rests entirely on the firmographic data source's estimate.

notes: Revenue figures from Apollo (or any firmographic provider) are estimates, not audited figures. Treat as a shortlist to validate, not a finished target list.
